scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=@connext/db && npm run dev --workspace=apps/server & npm run dev --workspace=apps/web
scripts.dev:server: npm run build --workspace=@connext/db && npm run dev --workspace=apps/server
scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace=@connext/db && npm run dev --workspace=apps/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@connext/db && npm run build --workspace=connext-web && npm run build --workspace=@connext/server
